name: Energon Extraction Array
oracle_text:
When ~ enters, energize.
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
flavor_text: Precision-tuned to harvest the purest currents of Cybertronian fuel.
design_notes: This card serves as an uncommon upgrade to the common 'Energon Condenser'. While the common version only provides a single Energon token on entry, this array acts as a dual-purpose utility engine. It provides the same immediate value (energize) but also functions as a reliable mana fixer/ramp piece by tapping for any color of mana. This fits the 'artifact matters' and 'Energon ramp' archetypes perfectly, providing stability to decks that need both Energon tokens and colored mana production.
